paragraphs: Hi! I'm Arjhun, a software engineer and researcher currently pursuing my Master's in Computer Science at UMass Amherst. I specialize in suddenly wanting to build something overnight, and losing interest the very next day.
When I'm not busy abandoning yesterday's brilliant idea, I build things that matter. I've professionally worked in climate tech and cloud domains.
Outside of code, I moonlight as a tech writer, open-source contributor, gym rat and occasional cricketer.
Right now I'm deep in the rabbit hole of LLMs (aren't we all?) and how they can solve relevant problems. Always up to collaborate on interesting stuff!

entries.description: Early-stage VC-backed AI Infra startup in San Francisco. Building end-to-end R&D solutions for businesses to collect data and train LLMs.
Synthetic data generation for clinical use-cases. Working towards an EMNLP paper.
Advanced NLP, Distributed Computing, Independent Study on NLP × BioInformatics.
Job Scheduling systems for financial data operations. Modernizing logging and observability with AI.
Stateless, concurrent data pipelining for climate records. AI climate analytics. End-to-end pipeline converting credit offset records to actionable data for MicroEnergy Credits. FastAPI + GraphQL.
Efficient polyhouse-based solar drying through machine learning and IoT.
40+ features including carpooling, activities, payment. FastAPI + PostgreSQL. Stripe integration end-to-end.

items.name: yesreply
items.description: Inbox-as-a-marketplace. Adds a paywall to your email address. React, FastAPI, AWS SES, Stripe.

items.name: jargon
items.description: NER-based privacy policy analyser. BERT-powered clause extraction with 0.80 F1 on legal text.

items.name: toolboxAi
items.description: Ask questions about your PDFs. Multi-LLM routing, conversation history, RAG pipeline.

items.name: ChokeSpeare
items.description: Collection of generative models trained on different poems. Mixed-style poetry generation.

items.name: Reddit Scraper
items.description: High-performance CLI tool for Reddit data collection. Unique checkpointing and JSON trick.

items.name: WL Quick Compute
items.description: Speeds up Weisfeiler-Lehman kernel computations via batch split-merge strategy. 2-4x speedup.

items.name: EC2ER
items.description: Enhancing emotional intelligence in LLMs via synthetic data generation and fine-tuning. Up to +438% improvement on EmoBench.

items.name: Distributed Inference
items.description: GPU-accelerated AI inference server. C++ CUDA engine + Go REST API. Multi-model ONNX serving with low-latency inference.

items.name: SuitUP
items.description: AI-powered job discovery. Scrapes and matches jobs to your resume using NLP.
